title: SSR / SSG Readiness
description: Choose SSR, SSG, or ISR intentionally and keep metadata/content available at initial render.
do: Prefer SSG for stable marketing/content pages.
Use SSR/ISR where content changes frequently.
Ensure metadata is available at initial render.
dont: Generate important SEO content only after client API calls.
Forget fallback states for dynamic routes.
Allow missing metadata on generated pages.
